subcodes.first_line: The Book from before the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, We have sent down the verses unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم انا انزلنا الایات علی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
